title: lepidium scandens
intro: Lepidium scandens, also known as climbing peppergrass or creeping pepperwort, is a climbing plant species in the mustard family that is native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Lepidium scandens include its ability to treat colds, coughs, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a digestive aid. Lepidium scandens can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional cooking as a spice.
